impact: This removes malformed Python comparison examples that were repeatedly copied into worker proposals, resets the recovery sequence to retry the lowest incomplete checkbox-27 prerequisite before later stale tasks, and adds a narrow follow-up task for prompt sanitization so autonomous progress can resume deterministically.
summary: Repair PP&D supervisor context for checkbox-27e confidence recovery.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 1 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-35: Recovery for checkbox-27e: after checkbox-27d passes, add one mutation case for out-of-range `confidence` only. Use only complete Python comparisons such as `if not isinstance(confidence, (int, float)):` and `if confidence  1:`.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
